review_text: Amazing service and an astonishing view out over the water! I would recommend everyone to stay here!

Beautiful place
Been there twice now  once for our honeymoon and again  for a family holiday with the kids
It's our go to now definitely comeing back
Great to relax
Staff are very friendly
You won't be disappointed

This is our go to place whenever we are in the Nambucca Heads area, it is a privately owned caravan park with terrific Management and a great view especially if your lucky to get one of the sites that back onto the river.
The main business area is not to far away, and it's a top spot to have as a base camp while you explore the area
I would highly recommend staying here if you are in the area.
One of the best caravan parks we've stayed at. Amenities spotless. Camped right next to the river. Very quiet, close to shops.

Stayed there for 7 days and absolutely loved it , We had several family members staying there and we stayed in 4 different cabins, Cabins aren’t huge but they’re comfortable and suit the purpose..The area is obviously tidal but had great boat and kayak access a great percentage of the time .We had a short 10 second walk to the waterfront and we made great use of the waterfront tables and bbq ..It probably suits the people travelling without kids more than those with kids but that suited us just fine 😉
Golf club , RSL and Cafe within  walking distance for the reasonably fit (5 to 10 minutes)
The operators were nothing but friendly and helpful if not a little cheeky which enhanced our stay there
Would definitely recommend and the only reason I rate it 5 stars is because there’s no option to give more 👍
We  stayed in our van - the sites were great. We ended up with a water front one ☝️ amazing.  Amenities were great too. The lady that checked us in was so welcoming - it’s a very friendly park

Was ein toller Campingplatz! Absolut sauber, ruhig und eine schöne Aussicht aufs Wasser. Wir hatten eigentlich einen normalen Stellplatz gebucht, aber die liebe Dame von der Rezeption gab uns für die eine Nacht einen Stellplatz mit Wasserblick. Total freundlich! Sehr zu empfehlen 😍
Simply amazing and peaceful with swimming and fishing. Great clean ammenities block, boat ramp access and helpful staff
Great caravan park however it needs some lovin

Der Campground liegt direkt am River ist gut ausgestattet und hat sehr saubere Waschräume und Toiletten.
Am River entlang kann man über einen schönen Spazierweg Richtung Ozean gehen.
Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis ist gut.
Abends kann man oft unzählige große Fledermäuse beobachten  die in einem gigantischen Schauspiel in die Nacht ausschwärmen.

It's a friendly family run park, the amenities are clean and the view over the river is beautiful. However, $40 for an unpowered campsite is a bit much, especially  considering there is no camp kitchen, just a couple of old BBQ plates. There is one sink with hot water to do your dishes without any lights. Try to do your dishes after dinner in the pitch dark. We'll try somewhere else next time.

I have been grey nomading around the country for 12 years now and this friendly baby boomer park is always one of the best for me. Internal small boat ramp with sandy kayak beach nearby is so rare. Just a happy place to be every time.
Clean and tidy park. Helpful staff. Park is on the river with easy access for fishing etc. close to town and other activities in the area.
Fabulous park great owners who couldn’t do enough to help spotless amenities perfect location  definitely be back again

Super friendly staff. Cabin was Simple, clean, Comfortable, cosy, including everything you need in a surprisingly well stocked kitchenette.
Oh and did I mention location. Location location location.

We stayed a week here on a powered van site right on the riverfront which leads into the beach in the distant view. Beautiful to wake up to an abundance of pelicans and other waterbirds. Everything you want with so many walkways and waterways to fill the day. Some great cafes and restaurants- check Matildas when you go which is only a short walk away. Facilities super clean and very friendly park and managers. We loved our time here and its now one of our favourites. Theres  a boat ramp a few sites up from where we were and there is a boat rental place just up the road for anyone not wanting to bring theirs. This park is peaceful and has everything for a relaxing stay.

My family stayed in cabin 5,  we had a terrible sleep as the mattress was poking us all night from the springs in the mattress. We walked in the room and were informed we had to pay $20 extra for sheets and we had to make the bed when we arrived. For spending over $930 for seven days. The view was nice but service at front desk was arrogant and wasn't able to help us when we asked nicely for a new mattress to be replaced for future stays.
Perfect overnight stay in a picture perfect spot!

Cabins and grounds well maintained. Easy walk to shops and Cinema and scenic breakwall. Owners Joanne and Tony friendly and were extremely helpful in my times of need. I would give them 6 stars out of 5.
Very friendly owners, magic spot RIGHT on the water.

Cabins are very clean and pleasant.
Great, convenient park right on the Nambucca River.
Thank you, Tony and Jo, for a wonderful revisit. Will be back.
We had a riverfront site & when the showers ceased, it was beautiful. Close to RSL and the town shopping. Apparently,  it has 2 Woollies???
Bathrooms were extremely clean, park was in a nice location on the river, unfortunately weather was awful when we stayed but would love to come back
Great caravan Park for the price.
Wonderful quiet clean caravan park, great location, excellent service highly recommended. We are planning next time to stay longer.
Beautiful spot for a family getaway. The deluxe cabin was perfectly set up and had views of the water. The staff were lovely. We will definitely be back!

Small quiet park right on the river at Nambucca heads. Beautiful location, good fishing🎣 and pet friendly.We had powered camping sites, each with a concrete pad,so can't talk on cabins. Amenities clean but older vintage. Manager/?? owner very pleasant and helpful. Would go there again for sure 👍
Very squashing,  water view blocked by trees

Great location, friendly and helpful staff.|Close to town centre, clubs / pubs and beaches.|Hassle free accommodation. |Very clean and tidy amenities including cabins. |Private boat ramp for all water activities.|Easy access to waterways for fishing and kayaks.
Highly recommend this park . The owner is so friendly and caring . Beautiful views . Try and book right on the river amazing. You have to stay here 💕
Great little park.friendly managers.clean facilities.  Location superb.

Had a wonderful six nights here. The unit we had was clean and comfortable and the staff were helpful and friendly.    The park is right on the river and the Family had fun fishing and crabbing and boating.   Yes, we had a good feed of crabs.  Would recommend this park to anyone who enjoys the quieter type of caravan park
What a lovely spot on the beautiful Nambucca River. Close to everything. Older but spotless amenities
Great location and friendly staff. Amenities a bit outdated but, clean and work well . On a caravan site.
Very expensive $60.00 per night for powered site caravan.  Admittedly, school holidays and yet there were only four vans and no kids around. Clean amenities block and helpful staff..

Booked about a month in advance. So over the phone it sounded just a little strange. First was the no linen provided but could be provided at extra cost. Second I asked if i paid for linen would the bed be made. No was the answer. Anyway, love Nambucca and nothing else suited for price and location.|So arrived late in the day, male host must have taken pity on having an elderly gent booking a cabin with no bathroom facilities so he upgraded me and threw the linen in for free. No complaint from me. Just had to make the bed which is a touch to far for me with mobility issues.|Anyway, it was a nice cabin, full stove and full size fridge, bathroom was tops with great water pressure for the shower. |An easy walk to the RSL which is a beaut club with really good food and drink prices to match.|All in all, what is there not to like about this park and Nambucca?
Love staying here. Beautiful river views. Always quiet. Perfect for fishing and any water activities. Older style park but always clean, great friendly helpful staff.
Very easy to get to with a caravan. Enjoyed our 2 stays. And a lovely position on the river.
Very friendly helpful cabins clean comfortable had a wonderful 4 days definitely stay there again

Another beautiful stay, this time for 7 weeks on a waterfront site. We love coming back here, managers Tony and Jo are so helpful, see you again next year. For any bowlers Nambucca bowls club is easy walking distance and has to be on of the friendliest clubs, RSL and golf club also very close, all do great meals.

Older, but really nice little park. I love it's not owned by a large corporation. Happy to support a smaller operator. Older but clean amenities. The only issue was the price. $40 a night for an un powered is shameful. This is a $25 a night unpowered experience.

Friendly and helpful staff. Great views (we were in a tent right on the water). Very clean. Had trouble packing tent away (I’m 75), Jo came out of office and helped get us organised and packed. Will be going there every chance we can. Trying cabins next time lol

An absolutely beautiful caravan park. The managers are absolutely lovely will help you, however they can just a beautiful location sitting right near the river having your morning cuppa coffee and at night watching the sunset just gorgeous
This caravan park even allows pets.

We've stayed here numerous times in a campervan. Great location and top service from owners. When there's a problem with noise, they don't hesitate to address it head-on. It makes for a park where you get a good nights' sleep.
Love this little place right on the river and walking distance to town.

Nothing better than a family run business in an ideal location. Having driven past hundreds of time over many years I had never had reason to pop in or stay.

But we found a need to spend five nights in a cabin [with AC] and just loved it.l Close to the river, with great facilities. Ideal for a couple or family that want river access for fishing, swimming, diving or boat.

Easy walk to town, shops, RSL,  V-Wall or golf course. Great place to say... we will be back!
Great stop

Very well  located.  Quiet and close to town.  Reasonably small sites that might be difficult for vans over 8 metres.  It would been nice  to have a rubbish dump point at both ends of the park.   I guess there is a reason but very  annoying when it is wet.

Excellent stay in Cabin 5 the best on the end for hubby and I as it has fewer neighbours, riverfront views, tv, fridge and cooking facilities, own bathroom. Short drive to IGA, our preference as easier parking, or Woolworths. Great park next door if you have kids. Tony very helpful, recommended drive to Taylor Arm the pub with no beer, But best local place for drink and enjoying views, walk the v wall at the pavilion. The wharf street cafe was nice for breakfast. The bed was a little hard at first but we got used to it and extended our stay. Top spot. Very reasonably priced, cheaper per night the longer you stay. Great quiet place to unwind. Highly recommend. We would like to come again.
Wir verbrachten hier eine Nacht mit unserem Camper. Wunderschöner Blick direkt auf das Wasser. Die Anlage ist sehr gepflegt, mit allem was man braucht. Wir würden hier wieder übernachten.
Stayed in a 2 BR Cabin. A great place to stay and good customer service team. Recommended. Will return in future.
Nice little park. Clean ammenities. Great waterfront sites. Helpful managers.
Great little park. Enjoyed it thoroughly.

Fabulous caravan park right on the Nambucca River...you couldn't get any closer! Your hosts are very accommodating and will help with guiding you into your site. Fish for dinner from the banks of the Nambucca River...have a swim or a snorkel...it really feels like paradise. Highly recommended!🌞🏊🚣🏄🐟🐬
